steps: Go to https://dashboard.knock.app/ and log in or create a free account
Select your environment (Development or Production) from the top selector
Navigate to 'Developers' > 'API Keys' in the left sidebar
You will see your Public API Key and Secret API Key listed
Copy the Secret API Key — this is used for server-side API calls
Use the key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_SECRET_KEY'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Secret API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Knock Secret API Key from the API Keys settings page. Use the secret key (sk_...) for server-side calls.

notes: Free tier available: up to 10,000 monthly notifications
Two key types: Public Key (pk_...) for client-side use, Secret Key (sk_...) for server-side API calls
Separate keys per environment (Development vs Production)
The secret key is shown on the dashboard and can be rotated at any time
Keys are prefixed with sk_test_ (development) or sk_live_ (production)

test_endpoint.description: Returns a paginated list of users in the environment
